title: Animation scenario: routes motion graphics to the right tool instead of faking it
prompt: We're building a 5-second animated logo intro: the word RIPPLE types on letter by letter, then a wave ripples through the letters, over a transparent background for later compositing. Plan how you'd produce it with the best tool for the job - don't render or generate anything yet. Write the plan to plan.md and summarize your recommendation in your final message.
